inputs.label: Purchase Price
inputs.businessContext: The price at which the property is purchased.

inputs.label: Rehab Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total cost of renovations and repairs.

inputs.label: After Repair Value (ARV)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated market value of the property after renovations.

inputs.label: Operating Expense Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of monthly rent reserved for operating expenses (taxes, insurance, maintenance, vacancy, management).

inputs.label: Refinance LTV
inputs.businessContext: Loan-to-value ratio for refinancing, expressed as a percentage of ARV.

inputs.label: Refinance Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual interest rate for the refinance mortgage.

inputs.label: Loan Term
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the refinance loan in years.

formulas.monthlyMortgagePayment: refinanceAmount * (monthlyInterestRate * Math.pow(1 + monthlyInterestRate, numberOfPayments)) / (Math.pow(1 + monthlyInterestRate, numberOfPayments) - 1)
